project_type: TypeScript monorepo - pnpm workspace with multiple apps (Fastify backends) and shared packages
build_system: pnpm@10.28.1 with turbo for orchestration. Each app has its own package.json, vitest.config.ts, tsconfig.json, and tsconfig.backend.json
test_framework: Vitest ^2 with globals:true, tests in backend/__tests__/*.test.ts, mock-based DI testing pattern
verification_instructions: 1. Run `NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run` from the apps/quantdrive directory. 2. Run typecheck with `pnpm --filter @quant/quantdrive run typecheck`.
setup_instructions: pnpm install from root to install all workspace deps
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can install packages from registries. Node >=22.0.0. TypeScript ~5.5.0.
contribution_requirements: TypeScript strict mode enabled. Services use DI with interfaces for database clients. Tests use vi.fn() mocks. Zod for validation. Fastify for routes. All imports use @quant/* workspace packages for shared functionality.
key_patterns: 1. Services: class-based with constructor DI (PrismaClient interface defined inline), createAppError for errors. 2. Routes: Fastify plugin pattern with zod validation, auth via request.auth.userId. 3. Tests: createMockPrisma() factory, describe/it/expect/beforeEach/vi from vitest. 4. App: createApp from @quant/server-core, register routes with prefix. 5. AI services: inject AIEngine from @quant/ai, call ai.infer() with structured prompts. 6. Package.json: workspace:* deps, scripts: test/typecheck/dev.
directory_structure: Root: apps/ (quantdocs, quantmail, quantchat, quantsync, quantedits, etc.), packages/ (common, auth, ai, server-core, database, storage, etc.), services/. Each app: backend/ (app.ts, routes/, services/, __tests__/), package.json, vitest.config.ts, tsconfig.json, tsconfig.backend.json.
